back_flavor: When André turned 13, his parents scrounged up just enough money to buy him a ticket to the Central Paris Theatre. Enamored by the art form, André quickly became obsessed with the silver screen, working tirelessly to act his way to Hollywood. There, while filming A Cosmic Journey, he experienced inexplicable and world-altering happenings. As the lines between reality and fantasy began to blur in his mind, his peer and friend, Betsy Baxter, suggested a change of scenery. At her recommendation, André packed up and moved to the small town of Arkham, Massachusetts for a much-needed break.
back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Know the Exit, Know the Line, Know the Scene, Weight of the World, 1 random basic weakness.
deck_requirements: size:30, card:60352, card:60353, card:60354, card:60355, random:subtype:basicweakness
name: André Patel
text:
[reaction] After you succeed at a skill test by 2 or more during your turn: You may take an additional action this turn. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. Gain 1 resource.

name: Know the Exit
text:
André Patel deck only.
While this card is committed to an attack or an evasion, it gains [wild] [wild].

name: Know the Line
text:
André Patel deck only.
While this card is committed to a skill test on a scenario card, it gains [wild] [wild].

name: Know the Scene
text:
André Patel deck only.
While this card is committed to an investigation or parley, it gains [wild] [wild].

name: Weight of the World
text: Revelation - Put Weight of the World into play in your threat area. Forced - When you fail a skill test while Weight of the World is in play, take 1 horror and shuffle it back into your deck.

name: Unaware
text: Revelation - Put Unaware into play in your threat area. Forced - The first time you fail a skill test during your turn: Draw the top card of the encounter deck. If that card is an enemy, discard Unaware.

name: Center Stage
text: Limit 1 per investigator. Uses (3 renown). If there is no renown on Center Stage, discard it. [fast] During a skill test, spend 1 renown and exhaust Center Stage: You get +1 skill value for each action you have spent this round (including this one, if this is triggered during one of your actions).

name: Fame
text: Uses (4 renown). If there is no renown on Fame, discard it. [action] If there is an enemy at your location, spend 1 renown: Parley. Gain 2 resources.

name: The Grapevine
text: Uses (3 rumors). If there are no rumors on The Grapevine, discard it. [action] Spend 1 rumor and exhaust The Grapevine: Parley. Choose an enemy at a revealed location up to 2 connections away. Move (one location at a time) along the shortest path to that enemy's location and engage it.

name: Extravagant Ring
text:
Uses (3 renown).
[reaction] When you would succeed at a skill test, spend 1 renown and exhaust Extravagant Ring: You get +2 skill value for this test.
[action] Exhaust Lockpicks: Investigate ([intellect]). Add your [agility] to your [intellect] for this test. If you do not succeed by at least 2, discard Lockpicks.

flavor: "I am certain this city will know of your accomplishments."
name: Marcus Sengstacke
text: You gain 1 additional resource during the upkeep phase. Forced - After you fail a skill test: Deal 1 horror to Marcus Sengstacke.

name: Polished Cane
text: [action]: Fight ([combat]). Add your [agility] to your [combat] for this attack. If this attack succeeds by 2 or more against a non-[[Elite]] enemy, you may exhaust Polished Cane to automatically evade that enemy.

flavor:
"Better luck next time, love."
- R. S.
name: Clean Sweep
text: Investigate ([intellect]). You get +2 [intellect] for this investigation. If you discover the last clue at your location, you may move to a connecting location.

name: Pay Your Dues
text: Parley. Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location with X remaining health. That enemy disengages from each investigator and gains aloof until the end of the round. Discover 1 clue at your location.

name: Quick Exit
text: Evade ([agility]). You get +2 [agility] for this evasion. If you succeed by 2 or more and the evaded enemy is non-[[Elite]], that enemy does not ready during the next upkeep phase.

name: A Sudden Fall
text: Fight ([combat]). You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If the targeted enemy is exhausted, this attack deals +1 damage.

name: Easy Street
text:
Commit only to a skill test you are performing. Max 1 committed per skill test.
Easy Street gains [wild] for every 3 resources you have (to a maximum of [wild] [wild] [wild]).

name: Out the Door
text: After Out the Door is committed to a skill test, the performing investigator gains 2 resources. If this skill test fails, that investigator loses 2 resources.

Uses (3 supplies). If there are no supplies on Lockpicks, discard it. [action] Exhaust Lockpicks: Investigate ([intellect]). Add your [agility] to your [intellect] for this test. If you do not succeed by at least 2, remove 1 supply from Lockpicks.

name: Out the Door
text: After Out the Door is committed to a skill test, the performing investigator gains 4 resources. If this skill test fails, that investigator loses 4 resources.

name: The Grapevine
text: Uses (3 rumors). If there are no rumors on The Grapevine, discard it. [action] Spend 1 rumor and exhaust The Grapevine: Parley. Choose an enemy at a revealed location up to 3 connections away. Move (one location at a time) along the shortest path to that enemy's location and engage it. Draw 1 card.

flavor: "I am certain this city will know of your accomplishments."
name: Marcus Sengstacke
text: You gain 1 additional resource during the upkeep phase. Forced - After you fail a skill test: Deal 1 horror to Marcus Sengstacke.

flavor:
"Better luck next time, love."
- R. S.
name: Clean Sweep
text: Investigate ([agility]). Add your [intellect] to your [agility] for this test. After this test resolves, you may move to a connecting location.

name: Quick Exit
text: Evade ([agility]). Add your [willpower] to your [agility] for this test. If you succeed and the evaded enemy is non-[[Elite]], that enemy does not ready during the next upkeep phase.

name: A Sudden Fall
text: Fight ([agility]). Add your [combat] to your [agility] for this test. If the targeted enemy is exhausted, this attack deals +2 damage.

name: Contingency
text: While Contingency is committed to a skill test targeting an enemy, after revealing chaos tokens, you may spend 3 resources to cancel a revealed token, return it to the chaos bag, and reveal a new one. (You may do this any number of times.)

Exceptional. Uses (0 charges). Forced - After your turn begins: You may take all charges here, as resources. Place 1 charge here. If it has exactly... - ...1 charge, you get +4 skill value for your next skill test. - ...2 charges, you may move up to 3 times. - ...3 charges, you may take 2 additional actions this turn.
